narrative:
Highland Heights-04-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 830 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.6 percentage points.
